courses.title: Chai aur JavaScript
courses.description: Complete JavaScript series from fundamentals to advanced ES6+ features, DOM manipulation, and asynchronous programming by Hitesh Choudhary.

courses.title: Chai aur React
courses.description: Project-based ReactJS series covering Hooks, Context API, state management (Redux Toolkit), and building production-grade web applications.

courses.title: Chai aur Backend
courses.description: Production-grade backend engineering with Node.js, Express, MongoDB, JWT authentication, file uploads with Multer, and robust data modeling.

courses.title: Agentic AI Cohort
courses.description: Hitesh Choudhary's cohort course on Agentic AI, LangChain, crewAI, and building custom LLM agents. (Track progress manually).

lessons.title: Chai aur Javascript | Introduction
lessons.description: Welcome to the complete JavaScript series. We start our journey from zero to advanced concepts.

lessons.title: Variables and Constants in JavaScript
lessons.description: Understanding let, const, and var in modern JavaScript environments.

lessons.title: Datatypes and ECMA Standards
lessons.description: Exploring primitive types, symbols, objects, and ECMAScript specifications.

lessons.title: Datatype Conversion Confusion
lessons.description: Mastering implicit coercion, explicit casting, and weird JS behaviors.

lessons.title: Comparison of Datatypes
lessons.description: Strict equality (===) vs abstract equality (==), null/undefined comparison edge cases.

lessons.title: Strings in Modern JavaScript
lessons.description: Template literals, string methods, slice, substring, split, and clean formatting.

lessons.title: Nums and Maths in JS
lessons.description: Number parsing, precision, decimal handling, and Math.random() usage.

lessons.title: Dates and Time in Depth
lessons.description: Working with JS Date objects, timestamps, formatting, and internationalization.

lessons.title: Arrays in JavaScript - Part 1
lessons.description: Understanding arrays, mutability, push, pop, shift, unshift, slice vs splice.

lessons.title: Objects in JavaScript - Part 1
lessons.description: Object literals, keys, symbols as keys, freezing objects, nested properties.

lessons.title: Chai aur React | Introduction
lessons.description: Welcome to the project-based React series. We discuss the roadmap, single-page architectures, and SPA flow.

lessons.title: Create React App with Vite
lessons.description: Initializing React apps the modern way using Vite, comparison with Create-React-App.

lessons.title: Understanding the React Flow and Structure
lessons.description: Analyzing main.jsx, App.jsx, index.html, and how React bootstraps.

lessons.title: Create your own React Library and Render
lessons.description: Writing a custom renderer to understand how React creates DOM nodes from objects.

lessons.title: Why we need hooks in React
lessons.description: Understanding the problem of standard variables not triggering UI updates, introduction to useState.

lessons.title: Counter Project in React
lessons.description: Practical application of state hooks to increment, decrement, and bound numbers.

lessons.title: Virtual DOM, Fiber and Reconciliation
lessons.description: A deep dive into React internals: Diffing algorithm, key prop necessity, and batching updates.

lessons.title: Tailwind and Props in React
lessons.description: Passing custom props, destructured props, default parameters, and styling dynamically with Tailwind.

lessons.title: Chai aur Backend | Introduction
lessons.description: Introduction to server-side engineering. Setting up the runtime environment and tooling roadmap.

lessons.title: How to deploy Backend Code in Production
lessons.description: Deploying server apps to Render, Railway, Vercel, handling node env configurations.

lessons.title: Connect Frontend and Backend in Javascript
lessons.description: Understanding CORS, proxy configurations, JSON data transfers, and standard fetch/axios integrations.

lessons.title: Data Modelling for Backend with Mongoose
lessons.description: Designing database schemas, collections, sub-documents, and validation schemas in Mongoose.

lessons.title: Ecommerce and Todo Data Modelling
lessons.description: Detailed entity-relationship models for an Ecommerce backend (Products, Orders, Categories).

lessons.title: How to Setup a Professional Backend Project
lessons.description: Building standard node configurations: npm init, eslint, prettier, src folder, express server initialization.

lessons.title: Express Router, Controllers and Utilities
lessons.description: Building custom router interfaces, controllers, async handlers, and API error wrappers.

lessons.title: User Register Logic and Middlewares
lessons.description: Building full user signup: checking database, hashing passwords with bcrypt, saving to DB.

lessons.title: Introduction to Agentic AI and LLM Architectures
lessons.description: Manual lecture 1 of the Agentic AI Cohort. Track your progress manually.

lessons.title: Understanding LLM Reasonings: ReAct, Chain of Thought, and Planning
lessons.description: Manual lecture 2 of the Agentic AI Cohort. Track your progress manually.

lessons.title: Building Your First Custom AI Agent from Scratch in Python
lessons.description: Manual lecture 3 of the Agentic AI Cohort. Track your progress manually.

lessons.title: Deep Dive into LangChain, AutoGen, and crewAI Frameworks
lessons.description: Manual lecture 4 of the Agentic AI Cohort. Track your progress manually.

lessons.title: Advanced Agent Evaluation, Testing, and Production Deployment
lessons.description: Manual lecture 5 of the Agentic AI Cohort. Track your progress manually.
